user_feedback: can you make the fish way slower, right now the fish comes out of the screen when it pops up and falls, and can you add a trajectory line of how I shoot as well, just make the fish floatier
analysis:
- Issue identified: 
  1. Fish swimming speed is too fast (using full type.speed multiplier)
  2. Fish launch velocity in shooting phase is too high (-12 to -17, causing them to fly off screen)
  3. Fish gravity in air is too strong (0.15), making them fall too quickly instead of being "floaty"
  4. No trajectory line showing gun aim direction
  
- Files affected: 
  1. entities.js - Fish movement speed and airborne gravity
  2. game.js - Fish launch velocity and trajectory line rendering
  
- Changes needed:
  1. Reduce fish swimming speed multiplier from full type.speed to type.speed * 0.3
  2. Reduce fish launch velocity from -12 to -17 range down to -5 to -7 range
  3. Lower gravity for airborne fish from 0.15 to 0.05 for floatier physics
  4. Add trajectory line visualization in shooting phase showing bullet path based on gun angle
